response:
Bat the historian can calculate the number of average purchases by dividing the total number of tokens by the average value per purchase. The total number of tokens is 240, and the average purchase cost is 18 pence. Therefore, the number of purchases is 240 divided by 18, which equals 13.33. Since the number of purchases must be a whole number, the historian can make 13 full purchases with the tokens, and there will be 240 - (13 × 18) = 240 - 234 = 6 tokens left over.

P.P.S. lake
